name: Osso
description: Osso — Enterprise SSO integration layer handling SAML and OIDC connections for SaaS applications without custom code.

seo.title: Osso — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Osso: Osso — Enterprise SSO integration layer handling SAML and OIDC connections for SaaS applications without custom code.

when_to_use: SAML SSO integration layer for SaaS enterprise customers
OIDC connection management without custom IdP code per tenant
Enterprise SSO onboarding workflow for B2B SaaS products
SCIM directory sync support for enterprise user provisioning
Multi-tenant SSO with per-customer IdP configuration

pros: Simplifies enterprise SSO across SAML and OIDC
Abstracts the pain of IdP configuration
cons: Not actually a fraud or risk tool
Overlaps with WorkOS and Auth0 SSO
Narrow scope compared to full IdP stacks
review.verdict: Useful SSO glue for SaaS selling to enterprise, but mislabeled here; it is auth infra, not fraud tooling.
review.best_for: SaaS platforms adding SAML/OIDC SSO for enterprise customers without building it in-house.
review.not_for: Anyone actually looking for fraud detection, bot management or transaction risk scoring.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
